query: Use datocms-setup-migration-autogenerate to add a helper around migrations:new --autogenerate for this repo.
Please run datocms-setup-migration-autogenerate. I want a local script that turns DatoCMS environment diffs into migration files.
Invoke datocms-setup-migration-autogenerate and wire a datocms:migrations:diff script that accepts --from and --to.
Use datocms-setup-migration-release-workflow so I can safely deploy migrations to production.
How do I autogenerate a DatoCMS migration by diffing two environments?
Add a reusable sandbox reset helper for my DatoCMS migrations.
